title: Tournament service layer with CourtHive sync
description: Create service methods for tournament providers and tournaments, including a SyncFromCourtHive method that calls the CourtHive calendar API (POST /api/courthive/provider/calendar) for a given provider abbreviation, parses the response, and upserts tournaments into the local database. New tournaments default to is_visible=FALSE. Existing tournaments get their name, start_date, and end_date updated. Tournaments that no longer appear in the CourtHive calendar are left untouched (not deleted).
acceptance_criteria: Service methods for provider CRUD (delegating to repository)
Service methods for tournament CRUD (delegating to repository)
SyncFromCourtHive(providerAbbr string) method that calls POST /api/courthive/provider/calendar
Sync correctly parses the calendar response JSON (tournaments array with tournamentId, tournament.tournamentName, tournament.startDate, tournament.endDate)
New tournaments inserted with is_visible=FALSE, display_order=0
Existing tournaments (matched by courthive_tournament_id) get name/dates updated, visibility unchanged
Sync returns a summary: count of new, updated, and unchanged tournaments
CourtHive API base URL is configurable via environment variable (COURTHIVE_API_URL, default http://courthive-server:8383)
HTTP client has reasonable timeout (10 seconds)
Errors from CourtHive API are wrapped with context and surfaced to the handler

approach: 1. Add TournamentProviderRepository and TournamentRepository to the admin Service struct
2. Create service_tournaments.go following the pattern of service_divisions.go
a. Build request: POST to {COURTHIVE_API_URL}/provider/calendar with JSON body {providerAbbr: abbr}
b. Parse response: extract tournaments[].tournamentId, tournaments[].tournament.{tournamentName, startDate, endDate}
c. For each tournament, check if courthive_tournament_id exists in local DB
d. If new: insert with provider_id, is_visible=FALSE
e. If existing: update name and dates only
4. Add COURTHIVE_API_URL env var reading in main.go, pass to service

testing_requirements: Sync inserts new tournaments with correct defaults
Sync updates existing tournaments without changing visibility
Sync handles CourtHive API errors gracefully (returns error, no partial writes)

context.user_story: As an admin, I want to pull the latest tournament list from CourtHive so I don't have to manually enter tournament IDs
